item.title: Version 1.24.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Introduce feature onboarding with "What's New" campaigns and localization support
  • Enhance Quick Access integration with video editor window management
  • Smart element capture
  • Add quick access settings for hiding cards when windows are open and animation style selection

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Update app sandbox entitlement check in release publish workflow

item.title: Version 1.23.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance shortcut handling for annotation tools and improve import validation
  • add overlay-free active-window quick capture

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Support cross-display drag, resize, and reselect in recording region overlay
  • Enhance area selection logging and improve screen resolution handling
  • defer quick access dismiss cleanup

item.title: Version 1.22.4
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Improve copyMediaFile utility for clipboard handling of media files

item.title: Version 1.22.3
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement swipe actions for Quick Access cards with customizable settings

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • resolve localization catalog drift in QuickAccess.xcstrings
  • Support both trackpad swipe directions for Quick Access dismiss with natural scrolling and improve OCR
  • Restore cursor to arrow on window close to prevent persistence of incorrect cursor states

item.title: Version 1.22.2
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Optimize snapshot capturing with async task group and reuse mask layer

item.title: Version 1.22.1
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • retain and restore previously active application during area selection
  • commit first area-selection drag and apply cursor on capture start

item.title: Version 1.22.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add two-finger swipe-to-dismiss functionality for Quick Access cards

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Update app icon assets and add padded app icon generation

item.title: Version 1.21.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Improve annotate item behavior blur and focus
  • Add new blur styles and corresponding tests for hexagonal, crystallized, pointillism, halftone, tape, and washi effects
  • Add auto redaction shortcut functionality

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • update deprecated stanza

item.title: Version 1.20.8
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add new aspect ratio options (3:4 and 2:3) to export settings and update related tests
  • Implement drag intent requirement for specific annotation tools and enhance drawing interaction logic
  • Add arrow bend direction functionality to annotation tools
  • Enhance Quick Properties Bar and Inline Area Properties Bar with Editing State Management

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Update window activation logic for annotation and video editor windows
  • Reorder clipboard copy and Quick Access actions in PostCaptureActionHandler for improved performance

item.title: Version 1.20.7
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Enhance clipboard image copying to ensure sandbox extensions and support inline pasting

item.title: Version 1.20.6
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Implement database recovery flow and enhance error handling for database operations

item.title: Version 1.20.5
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement zoom functionality for Quick Access pin window with scroll and pinch gestures

item.title: Version 1.20.4
item.description:
✨ Features

  • enhance image rotation functionality and add layout rect preservation for text annotations
  • add 90° image rotation buttons to annotate editor

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • don't drop first click on area selection overlay while backdrop is pending

item.title: Version 1.20.3
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add pinning functionality for screenshots in Quick Access and update related components
  • Enhance keyboard shortcuts for inline annotation, adding Cmd+C for copying images and updating documentation

item.title: Version 1.20.2
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Update capture naming templates and improve directory handling for screenshots and recordings

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Simplify drag handling and improve gesture classification in Quick Access components

item.title: Version 1.20.1
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance color palette functionality with favorite selection and custom color drafting
  • add application capture and recording actions to deep link handler and update documentation

item.title: Version 1.20.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement TOML configuration import/export with auto-apply on startup
  • Implement TOML configuration export and import for user preferences

item.title: Version 1.19.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement auto-scrolling functionality with accessibility support in scrolling capture

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • stabilize auto-scroll ci tests

item.title: Version 1.18.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Improve Quick Access card actions with enhanced state management and visual feedback
  • Enhance screenshot preset auto-application with lightweight canvas effect rendering
  • Implement persisted annotation session management
  • Implement screenshot preset auto-application and enhance annotation session management

item.title: Version 1.17.2
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add quick properties synchronization feature for annotation tools
  • Enhance Annotate functionality and preferences

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Implement vertical CJK OCR normalization and bitmap analysis

item.title: Version 1.17.1
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Bug fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.17.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add clipboard image behavior settings and localization for Annotate
  • Implement color palette management for annotation tools (#189, #188)

item.title: Version 1.16.4
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • correct Simplified and Traditional Chinese UI translations
  • Update ClipboardHelper to write single pasteboard item with multiple representations
  • Use native keyEquivalent column for overlay menu shortcuts

item.title: Version 1.16.3
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Bug fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.16.2
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add microphone input selection for screen recordings
  • Add cursor visibility option in recording settings and update related functionality

item.title: Version 1.16.1
item.description:
✨ Features

  • use camera cursor in application capture mode

item.title: Version 1.16.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement toggle sidebar functionality with keyboard shortcut support (cmd+b)
  • add blurred background effects to annotation canvas
  • Add background ratio and orientation options for annotation canvas

item.title: Version 1.15.1
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Bug fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.15.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement pinned screenshot windows with QuickAccessPinWindow and manager
  • Add refresh icon to status bar menu for improved user experience
  • Enhance image cropping functionality with improved scaling and pixel alignment for multi-display support
  • Enhance inline area annotation with multi-display support
  • Enhance multi-display screenshot functionality and improve capture session management
  • Add cloud upload functionality for capture history items with localization support
  • Implement Quick Access action customization and configuration

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Enhance localization error reporting with detailed missing and extra keys
  • Enhance multi-display capture functionality with target display selection
  • Improve capture markup sharpness by aligning cropped images to display pixel grid

item.title: Version 1.14.3
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add context menu and hover actions to Quick Access cards, including localization for Move

item.title: Version 1.14.2
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Enable default shortcut for area screenshot + inline annotate and update documentation

item.title: Version 1.14.1
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Improve Capture Markup inline doesn't work in macOS 15 and Add inline area control geometry tests for placement and insets

item.title: Version 1.14.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add inline area annotate capture functionality (#160, #40)

item.title: Version 1.13.2
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance audio handling in video editor with multitrack support

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Add audio encoding settings and compatibility exporter for mixed audio tracks

item.title: Version 1.13.1
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance text annotation handling and layout adjustments
  • add scripts for collecting crash logs and running tests

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Improve Chinese translations for General and Restart Onboarding
  • Improve undo/redo functionality for text editing and annotation properties

item.title: Version 1.13.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • open images from Finder's Open

item.title: Version 1.12.7
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Enhance VisionOCRProfile with additional language support and improve OCRService for diacritic handling

item.title: Version 1.12.6
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add crop orientation toggle and update aspect ratio handling
  • Improve microphone capture and integrate with recording session

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Enable microphone capture settings regardless of audio capture state
  • Improve history cleanup for Quick Access item deletions and add corresponding tests

item.title: Version 1.12.5
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add support for space key in CaptureOverlayShortcut and related tests

item.title: Version 1.12.4
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Bug fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.12.3
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Set sharingType to none for HUD and preview windows to prevent screen capture
  • Enhance cloud settings error handling and add graceful degradation for lifecycle permissions

item.title: Version 1.12.2
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance annotation resizing and selection handling for line annotations; add support for highlighter selection bounds

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Trim fully transparent capture fringe in window capture for improved output quality
  • Enhance drag-to-app functionality with lazy file promise and rendered file-URL fallback; ensure edits are saved after successful drag

item.title: Version 1.12.1
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Implement dynamic width measurement for bottom bar components and enhance drag handle functionality
  • Implement history item restoration through Quick Access for consistent session behavior
  • Update drawPath method to accept dynamic stroke width for improved rendering
  • Enhance annotation resizing functionality and improve selection bounds calculation
  • Update quarantine attribute command in installation instructions for macOS

item.title: Version 1.12.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Improve annotation canvas and crop tool functionality

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Implement recording save plan with processing directory management and update documentation

item.title: Version 1.11.2
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Increase frozen snapshot window hide settle delay and add option to exclude own application in capture

item.title: Version 1.11.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add application capture mode recording functionality

item.title: Version 1.10.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • add automation URL scheme
  • Add OCR scanning overlay and QR code detection support

item.title: Version 1.9.8
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Enhance recording functionality with improved state management and error handling

item.title: Version 1.9.7
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Bug fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.9.6
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Improve Cloud Uploads to Floating UI
  • Improve cloud upload functionality for Videos/Gifs
  • Implement multi-selection and deletion functionality in history panel
  • Enhance capture settings UI with segmented navigation for general, screenshot, and recording options

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Adjust frame sizes and alignment for history settings UI elements
  • Add size and mode hint indicators to area selection overlay

item.title: Version 1.9.5
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement file change tracking and thumbnail reload for history records
  • Add watermark annotation feature with customizable properties

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Implement dynamic font scaling for text annotations in overlay

item.title: Version 1.9.4
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance crop interaction management with context restoration and keyboard shortcuts

item.title: Version 1.9.3
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance annotation features with counter tool and improved stroke width management
  • Add support for opening multiple independent annotate windows and improve localization for new window action

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Improve drag-to-app preparation state management and enhance drag handle UI feedback

item.title: Version 1.9.2
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Update key code mapping to use active keyboard layout German for improved shortcut display

item.title: Version 1.9.1
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Improve wallpaper management to load bundled default wallpapers and update related UI components
  • Add corner radius support for rectangle annotations and update related UI components

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Set selected annotation ID upon adding a new annotation

item.title: Version 1.9.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add Capture History management and retention policies

item.title: Version 1.8.2
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Implement keyboard input handling for area screenshot sessions in AreaSelectionController and AreaSelectionWindow for resolve issue #99
  • Resolve issue #100 by implement dynamic keyboard shortcut handling in AppStatusBarController
  • Enhance clipboard functionality for edited captures in annotation and video editor workflows

item.title: Version 1.8.1
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement OCR request handling and benchmarking for improved text recognition

item.title: Version 1.8.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add configurable Application Capture shortcut and enhance overlay functionality
  • Implement application window selection mode in area capture

item.title: Version 1.7.8
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Improve Onboarding UI by replace black background with Opaque Background

item.title: Version 1.7.7
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Enhance CloudKeychainStore with improved upsert logic and legacy migration handling

item.title: Version 1.7.6
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance AppStatusBarController to maintain menu accessibility during recording and manage Preferences window exclusion

item.title: Version 1.7.5
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance screen capture with fast snapshot support and improved session handling

item.title: Version 1.7.4
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance shareable content caching and prefetching logic
  • Implement frozen area capture session (cmd+shift+3) for improved area selection

item.title: Version 1.7.3
item.description:
✨ Features

  • : add language selection step with immediate localization updates

item.title: Version 1.7.2
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add Vietnamese and Simplified Chinese localization to README files

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Enhance zoom functionality and image scaling across annotation features

item.title: Version 1.7.1
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Correct case of CatalogTool.swift in CI workflow
  • Correct Vietnamese translations in localization files

item.title: Version 1.7.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add language selection feature in preferences with localization support
  • Add localized privacy usage descriptions for multiple languages
  • Add localization support for English and Vietnamese, update documentation
  • Setup multi-language base

item.title: Version 1.6.3
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Bug fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.6.2
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Bug fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.6.1
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance badge label display with animation and improved visibility in scrolling capture preview

item.title: Version 1.6.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add preview image generation and scaling adjustments for scrolling capture
  • Enhance scrolling capture feedback with boundary detection and status updates
  • Introduce guidance system for scrolling capture with visual cues and state management
  • Enhance scrolling capture with finalizing state, preview truth management, and HUD updates
  • Implement Scrolling Capture Preview Renderer and Update Capture Flow
  • Enhance zoom and pan functionality with dynamic limits and improved state management
  • Add scrolling capture feature with keyboard shortcut and documentation
  • Update shortcut display names and descriptions for clarity

item.title: Version 1.5.11
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add arrow styling options and update annotation handling for arrows
  • Refactor background cutout button and update annotation tools group
  • Implement quick properties bar for annotation tools with customizable options

item.title: Version 1.5.10
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add keyboard shortcut overlay with customizable shortcuts and navigation

item.title: Version 1.5.9
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enable shadow for RecordingToolbarWindow and remove shadows from status bar and toolbar views
  • Align custom wallpaper rendering with system wallpapers and remove unnecessary frame height

item.title: Version 1.5.8
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement user-defined canvas presets with storage and management functionality
  • Enhance annotation functionality with embedded image support and improved import handling

item.title: Version 1.5.7
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add zoom transition duration configuration and improve zoom transition functionality in video editor

item.title: Version 1.5.6
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement cloud credential import and export functionality with password protection

item.title: Version 1.5.5
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • extract Keychain logic to CloudKeychainStore and update CloudManager credential handling

item.title: Version 1.5.4
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Bug fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.5.3
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Bug fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.5.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add background cutout auto-crop feature with user preference and UI updates
  • Implement object cutout feature with keyboard shortcut and UI updates

item.title: Version 1.4.8
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add user preference for showing cursor in screenshots and recordings

item.title: Version 1.4.7
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Optimize wallpaper loading and rendering with caching, limit displayed system wallpapers, and refine UI button hover effects.

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Persist crop state and improve crop tool interaction with automatic sidebar management.
  • Introduce to persist and re-edit canvas visual effects in annotation sessions.

item.title: Version 1.4.6
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance video encoding with dynamic bitrate, HEVC/H.264 codec selection, pixel-aligned capture, and diagnostic logging for recording.

item.title: Version 1.4.5
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Introduce user-configurable filename templates for screenshots and recordings.
  • Add cloud upload feature description and detail its security implementation in documentation.

item.title: Version 1.4.4
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Refactor zoom segment layout and interaction to ensure a minimum visual width and improve UI adaptation for small blocks.
  • Align video preview zoom and pan calculations with export output for accuracy and update camera transition duration.
  • Enhance auto-focus engine with improved path generation, quality metrics, and canonical mouse sample handling.

item.title: Version 1.4.3
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement a dedicated save flow for temporary captured videos and GIFs, including dynamic primary action button text.

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Dynamically set video composition frame duration from source and log detailed recording frame statistics.
  • Enhance screen capture and recording by improving desktop icon and widget exclusion and preventing self-capture of UI elements.

item.title: Version 1.4.2
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement caching for cloud usage data and refactor CloudUsageService with a dedicated worker actor.
  • Add masked endpoint display logic to CloudManager and integrate it into the Preferences view.
  • Implement password protection for cloud credentials, including gate and initialization UI.

item.title: Version 1.4.1
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Prevent cloud configuration save if S3 lifecycle rule application fails and refactor S3 lifecycle XML string formatting.
  • Resolve AWS S3 signature issues by removing manual Content-Length and refining header/URI encoding for signing, and update Keychain identifiers.

item.title: Version 1.4.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement LazyView for deferred SwiftUI tab loading and cache cloud configuration details.
  • Enhance cloud upload records with content type and thumbnail support, and add advanced filtering, sorting, and display modes to the upload history view.
  • Add cloud usage service to track and display bucket storage, object count, and lifecycle rules.
  • Implement cloud object lifecycle management to configure and remove expiration rules for S3 and R2 storage providers.
  • Improve UI of cloud configuration.
  • Remove cloud overwrite confirmation alert and directly trigger cloud upload.
  • Ensure removes history records when overwrited upload screenshot
  • Implement cloud storage integration with S3/R2 providers, preferences, and overwrite handling for annotated images.

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Improve keystroke name resolution in by using -based mapping for global monitor reliability.
  • Add support for punctuation, keypad, and navigation keys to .

item.title: Version 1.3.5
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Bug fixes and improvements

item.title: Version 1.3.4
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Update Space key to function in text inputs and provide cursor feedback for pan mode.

item.title: Version 1.3.3
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • add to accurately determine the active screen for multi-monitor UI positioning and capture operations.
  • Write both NSURL and NSImage to the pasteboard for maximum compatibility across applications.

item.title: Version 1.3.2
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Always display the 'Copy' button in the Quick Access card hover overlay.

item.title: Version 1.3.1
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • enhance image rendering and screen capture quality with pixel-perfect techniques and dynamic scaling.

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement canvas panning functionality using the Space key and mouse drag, and refine zoom range options.
  • Add keyboard shortcuts and trackpad gestures for zoom, expand zoom range, and animate transitions.
  • Include window shadows in screen capture for macOS 14.0+ by setting to false.
  • Introduce configurable shortcuts for the annotate editor's copy-and-close and toggle-pin actions, updating UI and event handling.

item.title: Version 1.2.6
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Add a warning message about WebP encoding speed in capture settings.
  • Add .webp, .jpg image format support and format-aware clipboard copying for screenshots and annotations.

item.title: Version 1.2.5
item.description:
✨ Features

  • add splash screen skip functionality with a Do

item.title: Version 1.2.4
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • : centralize sound playback management and solve issue sound playback calls across the application

item.title: Version 1.2.3
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhance text annotation editing with automatic commit on tool switch or click away, improve text editor sizing, and enable annotation movement in all tool modes.
  • Implement multiline text editing for annotations with dynamic height and word wrapping

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • resolve annotation drag/resize state management and updating the active tool upon selection.
  • Enhance annotation selection and tool switching UX, improve keyboard shortcut reliability
  • fix select & deselect textbox

item.title: Version 1.2.2
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • replace AnnotateDragSource with NSFilePromiseProvider for improved drag performance and compatibility

item.title: Version 1.2.1
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Implement window pinning for the Annotate feature with UI, state, and keyboard shortcut
  • Improve annotation save responsiveness with instant UI updates and background saving, refactor session data to use raw image data
  • implement annotation session caching and update clipboard actions

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Mouse click highlight overlays during screen recording
  • Keystroke overlay display during recording
  • Configurable mouse & keystroke preferences with persistence
  • Dynamic scaling for Quick Access card dimensions
  • Improved mouse event handling with caching, throttling, and animation control

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed curl pipe compatibility for install script

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Improved Quick Access, capture, and consume flow

item.title: Version 1.0.15
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhanced local update testing with detailed signing process and entitlements handling

item.title: Version 1.0.14
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Internal build and release pipeline improvements

item.title: Version 1.0.13
item.description:
🔧 Maintenance

  • Internal build and release pipeline improvements

item.title: Version 1.0.12
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Improved self-signed certificate trust for code signing
  • Detailed update manager lifecycle logging

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed interactive trust setting for self-signed certificate in CI
  • Added self-signed certificate generation and TCC permission testing scripts

item.title: Version 1.0.10
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Cache management with size calculation and clearing options

item.title: Version 1.0.9
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Enhanced code signing process and updated entitlements for improved security

item.title: Version 1.0.8
item.description:
✨ Features

  • System screenshot shortcut conflict detection and user guidance in onboarding

item.title: Version 1.0.7
item.description:
🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Improved screen capture permission handling
  • Skip strict bundle signature validation in debug builds

item.title: Version 1.0.6
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Enhanced Sparkle DMG signing reliability in release workflow

item.title: Version 1.0.5
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Ad-hoc signing and verification for fallback distribution
  • Bundle identity management with AppIdentityManager
  • Updated DMG background image and creation process

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed bundle identifiers and dispatch queue labels

item.title: Version 1.0.3
item.description:
✨ Features

  • Installation script with version-specific install instructions
  • Homebrew installation support with SHA256 verification
  • Release workflow automation with DMG signing and appcast updates

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed Sparkle key condition for DMG signing in release workflow

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
🎉 Initial Release

  • Capture fullscreen or selected-area screenshots
  • Extract on-screen text with OCR capture
  • Record screen as video or GIF
  • Annotate images with shapes, text, blur, crop, and more
  • Launch from menu bar with global shortcuts
  • In-app updates via Sparkle
